_All claims below are sourced from `../raw/web/stripe-pricing-2025.md` unless otherwise noted._

## What it does

Stripe's public 2025 pricing — successor to the 2024 capture.

## Key features

- Standard rate **2.9% + 30¢** per transaction (unchanged from 2024)
- New: tiered volume discounts above 100k tx/mo

## When to use

Reference for cost modeling for non-negotiated accounts.
